sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current block position
after = current_frame

print("=== Orange block ===")
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\n=== Blue block ===")
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 15:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check area around blocks
ascii_lines = after.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Area (rows 25-50, cols 25-55) ===")
for r in range(25, 51):
    row_str = ""
    for c in range(25, 56):
        ch = ascii_lines[r][c]
        if ch == 'c': row_str += '.'
        elif ch == 'G': row_str += '#'
        elif ch == 'O': row_str += 'o'
        elif ch == 'b': row_str += 'b'
        elif ch == 'B': row_str += 'B'
        elif ch == 'W': row_str += '+'
        elif ch == 'w': row_str += ','
        else: row_str += ch
    print(f"{r:2d}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
